commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an install-mode fast path in managed npm plugin installs to skip npm install when an existing package version is equal to or newer than the requested version, plus unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main resolves the managed npm target and calls the duplicate-target availability gate before any installed-version comparison, and the current duplicate-install test asserts install mode rejects existing targets.
commands.review_followup: External PR handling is needed because contributor real behavior proof is still mock-only and the remaining code defects include a security-sensitive validation bypass.

target.title: fix(plugins/install): skip reinstall when installed plugin version satisfies requested
target.author: hclsys
